calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2018 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT
Off Calendar Jan-24-2018 Continued To Feb-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jan-10-2018 Off Calendar

First Account And Report Of Trustee, Petition For Settlement Of Account
Off Calendar Mar-23-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi for Andrea Leung (Conservator).
Nancy Rasch Court appointed Counsel for Dr. Way (Primary Beneficiary).
Franchesca Callejo for and with Eric Leong (Trustee).

Ms. Callejo addressed the Court's concerns with regard to the amount of Trustee's fees being a little more than three times the allowed guideline amount with no time sheets stating that the Trustee has been paying himself for the past twelve years based on an agreement he had with his Father back in 2002, that the Trustee is not obligated to provide time records, that the Trustee manages the investment accounts and the real property/rental properties, that there is a potential tax savings, and that this is historical practice and arrangements made with his Father. Counsel also addressed issues regarding the inefficient manner in which funds are being disbursed for Dr. Way's caregiving expenses/food/utilities/transportation, the enormous resistance from the Trustee with regard to a specific monthly amount, the struggle with receiving funds for Dr. Way's 100th birthday celebration, Eric being generous with paying himself but being very frugal with providing funds for his Father's care, unpaid loan balances, statements not being provided timely by Ms. Leung, etc. The Court noted that the issue before the Court is the accounting filed by the Trustee and that the principal issues are the Trustee's fees. The Amended First Account and Report of Trustee, etc. is taken under submission. The Court stated that it is not sure Trustee's fees are an appropriate mechanism for distributions, that its expectation is that it will allow a lessor amount for Trustee's fees, that the Trustee should be keeping time records and spoke of its responsibility of overseeing the Trust.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

First Account And Report Of Trustee, Petition For Settlement Of Account
Off Calendar Feb-07-2017 Continued To Mar-21-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Genevieve Callejo for Eric Leong (Trustee).
Nancy Rasch for Dr. Way (Conservatee/Beneficiary).

Ms. Callejo stated that she will serve the amendment this week, and that she will be out of the Country and will not be able to respond to any questions. The Amended First Account and Report of Trustee and Petition for Settlement Thereof, etc. is continued to March 21, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court expects the parties to be talking to each other.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
